payload.answer: This is a duplicate of an existing memory, so no new durable memory should be created.
citations: Existing memory: "Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans."

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement is a paraphrase of the existing memory and appears to refer to the same person (Sam from Goldman) and the same preference (likes Bill Evans).

details: Matched same subject: Sam from Goldman.
Difference is only phrasing ('mentioned' vs 'said'), so this is not a new fact or a conflict.

repair_options: Optionally attach the new mention as additional provenance to the existing memory card instead of creating a separate card.
